## Local-First Contract

- [ ] Runtime user data still lives under `~/.bcd`
- [ ] No `.env*`, local profile data, `.omx/`, `bcd.md`, `dist/`, or `node_modules/` files are committed
- [ ] Codex failures do not fabricate fallback predictions

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
